name: aws-openai
description: Build and operate AWS workloads that integrate with OpenAI APIs.

interface.longDescription: Use AWS OpenAI for architecture, deployment, and operations guidance when integrating OpenAI APIs with AWS services such as Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, and observability stacks.
defaultPrompt: Design an AWS architecture for an OpenAI-powered API
Set up secure secret management for OpenAI API keys on AWS
Troubleshoot latency and cost for OpenAI workloads on AWS
